mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, receiver_name, phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address (user_id, receiver_name, phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{phone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detail}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, phone = #{phone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail = #{detail}, is_default = #{isDefault} WHERE id = #{id}
